title: Any workarounds for board-level permission limitations?
excerpt:
Hi everyone, 
We’re running into some limitations with board-level permissions, specifically around restricting access to certain columns or updates for specific users. Has anyone found a good workaround or creative solu…

posts.author: DavisSmith (Davis Smith)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,
We’re running into some limitations with board-level permissions, specifically around restricting access to certain columns or updates for specific users. Has anyone found a good workaround or creative solution for this?

Would love to hear how others are managing it!

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Which product (CRM/Work Management, etc) and level (Pro/Enterprise) do you have?

posts.author: shannon-cxmonday (Shannon Thao)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Davis! Happy Friday. Can you share a little more context about what you’re hoping to set up on your board? Additionally, which plan tier is your account on?

You highlighted restricting access to certain columns–have you looked into column permissions (available on Pro and Enterprise Plans)? Or, are you looking for further customization beyond column permissions? I’d love to hear more about this! However, restricting view of the Updates Section would be considered a feature request at this time. You can upvote this existing feature request to continue prioritizing it on the product roadmap!
